x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the Staten Island DA's WordPress content (press releases, programs, victim services, community/scam advisories), proposes an aggregate prosecution-statistics surface for the office's dark case data, and adds submit_tip — the net-new write workflow that today is only a Contact Form 7 email form. Generic on purpose: a template for one shared five-borough DA API.

server.name: io.nyc.statenislandda
server.title: Staten Island District Attorney (Richmond County DA)
server.description: Agent-native access to the Office of the District Attorney, Richmond County (Staten Island DA) — press releases, prosecution programs and community initiatives, victim/witness services, and scam/safety advisories from statenislandda.org, plus a proposed aggregate prosecution-statistics surface and the net-new ability to submit and track a confidential tip that today lives only in a Contact Form 7 email form.
server.instructions: Use find_press_releases / get_press_release for the office's news. find_programs / get_program cover the 'Our Efforts' bureaus, units, and initiatives (Domestic Violence Bureau, Animal Cruelty Prosecution Unit, SI HOPE, Overdose Response, Cash for Guns, Saturday Night Lights, Youth Advisory Council). find_victim_services returns victim/witness support. find_community_resources returns scam alerts and safety advisories. find_prosecution_statistics returns ONLY AGGREGATE caseload counts (proposed — no live source; never an individual case or defendant). submit_tip (net-new) files a confidential drug or scam tip; tips may be fully anonymous, so do NOT require sender identity — set anonymous=true unless the user volunteers contact details, confirm the tip text and any suspect/location details first, and set tipType appropriately. get_tip reads back a submitted tip's status by its confidential reference (authenticated).

tools.name: find_press_releases
tools.title: Find Press Releases
tools.description: Search the Richmond County DA's press releases by category, date range, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_press_release
tools.title: Get Press Release
tools.description: Fetch a single press release by its WordPress slug.

tools.name: find_programs
tools.title: Find Programs
tools.description: List the office's prosecution bureaus, units, and community initiatives ('Our Efforts') by category or free text.

tools.name: get_program
tools.title: Get Program
tools.description: Fetch a single program / bureau / initiative by its slug.

tools.name: find_victim_services
tools.title: Find Victim Services
tools.description: List victim and witness support services offered by the office, by service type or free text.

tools.name: find_community_resources
tools.title: Find Community Resources
tools.description: List scam alerts, fraud-prevention notices, and public-safety advisories by resource type, audience, or free text.

tools.name: find_prosecution_statistics
tools.title: Find Prosecution Statistics
tools.description: Return AGGREGATE caseload statistics by year and offense category (proposed — the office's dark data). Never returns an individual case or defendant.

tools.name: submit_tip
tools.title: Submit a Tip
tools.description: Submit a confidential drug or scam tip to the Richmond County DA. NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the Contact Form 7 email forms at /drug-tip-form/ and /scam-tip-form/. Mutates state. Tips may be fully anonymous; do not require sender identity. Confirm the tip text, tipType, and any suspect/location details before submitting.

tools.name: get_tip
tools.title: Get Tip Status
tools.description: Read back the status of a previously submitted tip by its confidential reference. Requires the submitter's tip credential.
